chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 501 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 21-12-2022 Mr. Imdad Ali Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Karim Bux Janveri, Assistant Attorney General. ***** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of respondent No.5 files comments on behalf of said respondent; which are taken on record and copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same seeks disposal of instant petition by directing the Electric Inspector, Sukkur to decide the applications of the petitioner dated 25 and 26th April, 2022 in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the respondent No.5 records his no objection to the above proposition. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of by directing the Electric Inspector, Sukkur to decide the aforementioned applications of the petitioner if received by him, or alternatively, in case the petitioner files fresh application expeditiously and preferably within a period of 30-days hereof in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
